description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a pastel blue exterior with playful, cartoonish graphics and the word 'MOOKIE' prominently displayed on both the marquee and side panels. The front panel includes a large rectangular screen area, a control panel with visible buttons and a joystick, and a coin slot below. The side panels are adorned with a whimsical illustration of a purple cartoon character holding a large red-and-white lollipop, reinforcing a fun and inviting theme. The back of the cabinet is plain and dark, likely for maintenance access, with no visible graphics or controls. The cabinet is constructed from sturdy materials, likely wood or MDF with a plastic laminate finish, and is designed to stand upright in public or recreational spaces.
description: A pastel blue arcade game cabinet with playful 'MOOKIE' branding, cartoon graphics, and a classic control panel with screen and coin slot. The sides feature a purple character with a lollipop, while the back is plain and dark.
description_view_0: Front view showing the screen, control panel with buttons and joystick, coin slot, and 'MOOKIE' marquee.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full cartoon artwork of a purple character holding a lollipop and the 'MOOKIE' logo.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain, dark panel and no visible graphics or controls.
description_view_3: Right side view, mirroring the left, with the same cartoon character and 'MOOKIE' logo.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and two buttons, arranged in a simple horizontal row with a pastel color scheme.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the word 'MOOKIE' in playful, rounded letters with a pastel color palette, matching the whimsical theme of the cabinet.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels display a large cartoon illustration of a purple character holding a red-and-white lollipop, with the 'MOOKIE' logo above. The background is light blue with a subtle pattern.
